pathAssistantSteps.info:
Action Required by the CRM Team


  1. Review the content: Carefully examine the provided preview (check the URL and/or the attached content).
  2. Give feedback as needed: Provide any necessary feedback in the Chatter section.
  3. Validate the preview: Confirm the publication by clicking on the "Confirm Publication" button. The Webhelp team will be notified and will proceed to publish the content.


Please note that for publications in both English and French, the actions must be carried out by the requester.
The content has been validated by either the CRM team or the requester and is now in the process of being published.

The Webhelp Team has been notified of the request.


  1. A Webhelp Team member must "Accept" the record to claim ownership.
  2. The Webhelp owner will build the publication preview according to the provided instructions.
  3. The Webhelp owner will inform the CRM team that the preview is ready via the "Notify CRM" button.
  4. The CRM team will review and give their approval.
  5. The Webhelp owner will publish the content and close the request by updating the current status to "Published."


Please note that for publications in both English and French, it is the requester who must provide the validation, not the CRMs.
